3283650.name: Van Simulator
3283650.description: Get behind the wheel and experience the life of a delivery driver in Van Simulator! Drive through bustling streets, pick up packages, and deliver them to their destinations. Manage your time efficiently and maximize your earnings as you expand your delivery business. With each successful delivery, you'll earn money to upgrade your van and take on bigger challenges. Whether you're navigating tight alleyways or racing the clock, every delivery counts. Do you have what it takes to be the best courier in town?
3283650.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
